'''Akanala''' was the only [[Moon/Legends|moon]] that orbited the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Akana]]. The artisans of that planet often drew inspiration for their works from Akanala. The entire surface of the moon glistened due to rich deposits of sparkling [[Quartz/Legends|quartz]]. Whenever Akanala reached its full phase, the [[Professiona Artists Guild|artist colony]] threw a wild party with much revelry and romance and displayed, read or performed everyone's work.

{{Moon-stub}}
